---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ChatFlow
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like in detail.

## 🔄 User Flow
Describe how users would interact with this feature:
1. User navigates to...
2. User clicks on...
3. System displays...

## 🎨 Design Considerations
- UI/UX requirements
- Accessibility considerations
- Mobile responsiveness

## 🛠️ Technical Considerations
- Backend requirements
- Frontend requirements
- Database changes needed
- API changes needed
- Performance implications

## 📊 Success Metrics
How would we measure the success of this feature?
- [ ] User engagement metrics
- [ ] Performance metrics
- [ ] Usage analytics

## 🔗 Related Issues
Link any related issues or discussions.

## 📸 Mockups/Wireframes
If applicable, add mockups or wireframes to illustrate the feature.

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Critical (Must have)
- [ ] High (Should have)
- [ ] Medium (Could have)
- [ ] Low (Won't have this time)

## 🌟 Additional Context
Add any other context, alternatives considered, or additional information about the feature request here.
